TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Elgin Baylor nalecuhan i Washington, D.C., nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Elgin Baylor i 1958 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 1, namapili' tu nu Minneapolis Lakers putiput. 9 bulad 16 demiad, 1934 a mihca, Elgin Baylor, miunduay.
S.PHON: …ôr~…ĺgin bajr~…ĺor nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i wasńßiŇčton, d. ¶., nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. …ôr~…ĺgin bajr~…ĺor i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ *, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu minn…ôapor~…ĺis r~…ĺak…ôrs putiput. * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, …ôr~…ĺgin bajr~…ĺor, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Elgin Baylor nalecuhan i Washington, D.C., nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Elgin Baylor i 1958 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 1, namapili' tu nu Minneapolis Lakers putiput. 9 bulad 16 demiad, 1934 a mihca, Elgin Baylor, miunduay.
